props.ChoiceText: You learned useful work in a place where skill mattered more than polish.
props.ChoiceBio: Village craft taught you competence, improvisation, and the pride of being needed.

0.TransitionText: Because village craft taught you competence, improvisation, and the pride of being needed, training ripened into the steadier discipline of real craft.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Craftsman, but you may remain on your current path instead.
